rationale: The cited paper is a quantitative meta-analysis of antecedents of new product performance, and the citing paper’s central model also explains new product launch success (from salesperson perceptions/control systems to customer perceptions and sales). The citing note explicitly states it extends prior new product introduction research and responds to prior calls for empirical evidence, so this reference is plausibly foundational rather than a generic mention. Given this strong conceptual overlap and potential substantive use, keep it for second-stage judgment.
